description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped cardboard box with four flaps, two of which are partially open and two are folded outward. The box is constructed from corrugated cardboard, giving it a slightly textured, matte brown appearance with subtle color variations typical of recycled paper products. The interior is visible and empty, showing the same brown material as the exterior. The box is rectangular in shape, with straight, crisp edges and a uniform height on all sides. The flaps are slightly bent, suggesting the box has been opened and possibly used before. There are no visible markings, labels, or tape on the surfaces.
description: A medium-sized, open cardboard box with four flaps, two of which are partially open and two folded outward. The box is brown, textured, and empty inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with two flaps angled outward and the interior clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with one flap more prominently extended outward and the box's depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the opposite set of flaps visible and the box's interior still open.
description_view_3: Back view with both rear flaps visible and the box's interior exposed, showing a more symmetrical appearance.
